creator: bsb@nipplehead.yi.org
text:
When mod_php4 is install with apache+mod_ssl-1.3.12+2.6.6, the mod_php4 port appends the appropriate directive to /usr/local/etc/apache/apache.conf.  Unfortunately, it doesn't put it in an appropriate place.  'AddModule mod-php4.c' is added within the 'IfDefine SSL' statements.  This being the case, php would only be available when apache is started with 'startssl'.  'AddModule mod_php4.c' should appear outside the 'IfDefine's.

Fix: 

Sorry.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/www/apache13-modssl
make install
cd /usr/ports/www/mod_php4
make install
